"[1] 75-S4 ON MZP UNTIL 1500 HRS - WILL ADV 1020S "
"[2] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from DETAIL to CLOSURE of a Road by CHP"
"[1] MAG ONR TO WB 91 CLOSED UNTIL 1500 HRS "
"[27] 1039 INV TO SEE IF 97 AT RUHS "
"[25] 1039 AMR TO FIND OUT WHERE TAKEN TO [Shared]"
"[23] PER FIRE PTYS TRANSPORTED UNK WHERE [Shared]"
"[19] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1182-Trfc Collision-No Inj to 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt by CHP [Shared]"
"[13] PTY REQG ETA - CPYS 2 UNITS ASSIGNED [Shared]"
"[10] [Notification] [CHP]-PER 74-40 LL * CONTACTED THE PARTY * 3RD PARTY ALREADY LEFT THE SCENE * PARTIES EXCH INFO * RP ADV SHE CALLED IN TO INQ IF SHE COULD LEAVE * PARTIES 98 NEG CHP "
"[4] RP IN A BLK NISS SENT VS GRY HOND ACC "
"[3] WITH PARTY OO VEH / LOOKED LIKE PULLING SOMETHING OO THE GRILL"
"[2] WHI BMW SD WAS PULLED TO RHS IN THE AREA"
"[1] LARGE DOG 1144 IN MIDDLE LN / WHI HUSKY"
"[2] ON A BICYCLE RIDING IN RT LN "
"[1] 59-R35 WORKING MZP IN TEHAHCHPI AREA FROM 0630- 1500 HRS PV 7286 SM 32866 "
"[4] 76-N7 TRAFFIC BREAK RELEASED /// # 2 WB LANE AT RED CLOUD WILL BE CLOSED UNTIL APPROX1330"
"[3] 76-N7 START TRAFFIC BREAK WB AT MM97"
